name: Cheese Spoon Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat milk in a double boiler.
2. When hot, add cornmeal and stir until thickened.
3. Add salt, butter, egg yolks, and grated cheese to the mixture.
4. Beat egg whites separately and fold into the cornmeal mixture.
5. Spoon batter into two quart casserole dishes.
6. Bake at 350°F for 35 minutes.
7. Serve 8 portions.
